info.name: Warehouse Management System - Dynamic ACL v.2.0.0
info.description:
Koleksi API Warehouse Management System dengan fitur baru Dynamic Role-Based Access Control (RBAC). Admin dapat mengelola izin (permissions) untuk setiap role (Admin/Operator) secara dinamis.

### Fitur Utama:
1. **Dynamic ACL**: Checklist CRUD per modul.
2. **RFID Scanning**: Integrasi scan untuk Inbound & Outbound.
3. **Inventory Control**: Manajemen Barang & Lokasi.
4. **Authentication**: JWT Based dengan auto-save token.

exec: console.log("Token successfully saved to collection variables!");
console.log("Token successfully saved to collection variables!");

Mengambil detail user berdasarkan ID. Membutuhkan izin: `user:read`

item.name: 05 - INBOUND (TWO-STAGE RECEIVING) (5 endpoints)
item.description:
Two-stage inbound receiving process:
Stage 1: Scan RFID tag to identify item
Stage 2: Scan QR code to confirm location and update stock

item.name: STAGE 1: Scan Item (RFID)
item.description: Scan RFID tag to identify item and get pending location. Returns inbound_item_id needed for Stage 2.

response.name: Error (Not Found)

item.name: STAGE 2: Set Location (QR Scan)
item.description: Scan QR code to confirm location, store receiving log, and update stock. Completes two-stage receiving flow.

item.name: 06 - OUTBOUND (ORDER DISPATCH) (4 endpoints)
item.description:
Order dispatch with 3 outbound types:
- LUNAS: Full payment order
- PINJAM: Loan order
- RETURN: Return order

response.name: Error (Bad Request)

item.name: Scan Item for Picking
item.description: Scan RFID tag during picking process. Updates qty_delivered and decrements stock.
